Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels

Class CoaEditorPanelFX

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.CoaEditorPanelFX
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class CoaEditorPanelFX extends javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane
Interactive ladder view for editing a company's Chart of Accounts.

Usage:


 CoaEditorPanelFX editor = new CoaEditorPanelFX(
         company.getChartOfAccounts(),
         chart -> {                       // on-save callback
             company.setChartOfAccounts(chart);
             CompanyLoaderService.saveCompanyFile(companyFile, company);
         },
         () -> root.setCenter(previousView)   // on-close callback
 );
 root.setCenter(editor);
This panel uses a TreeTableView to display the hierarchical chart of accounts and provides buttons for adding root accounts, sub-accounts, editing, deleting, importing/exporting as XLSX, saving changes, and cancelling.

  • Constructor Details

    • CoaEditorPanelFX

      public CoaEditorPanelFX(ChartOfAccounts chart)
      Convenience constructor for CoaEditorPanelFX when no specific save or close callbacks are needed. Calls the main constructor with null for onSave and onClose callbacks.
      Parameters:
      chart - The ChartOfAccounts to be edited. Must not be null.

    • CoaEditorPanelFX

      public CoaEditorPanelFX(ChartOfAccounts chart, Consumer<ChartOfAccounts> onSave, Runnable onClose)
      Constructs a new CoaEditorPanelFX. Initializes the panel with the given chart of accounts and sets up callbacks for save and close actions. The UI for the tree table view and control buttons is built and displayed.
      Parameters:
      chart - The ChartOfAccounts to be displayed and edited. Must not be null.
      onSave - A Consumer callback that accepts the modified ChartOfAccounts when the "Save" action is performed. Can be null if no save callback is needed.
      onClose - A Runnable callback that is executed when the panel is closed, either by saving or cancelling. Can be null if no close callback is needed.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if chart is null.

  • Method Details

    • getTreeTable

      public javafx.scene.control.TreeTableView<Account> getTreeTable()
      Returns the TreeTableView displaying the chart of accounts.

      This is primarily exposed so embedding containers can adjust properties such as the placeholder node when no company is open.

      Returns:
      the underlying TreeTableView component

    • setChartOfAccounts

      public void setChartOfAccounts(ChartOfAccounts chart)
      Replaces the currently displayed chart of accounts with the provided one and refreshes the view.
      Parameters:
      chart - the new ChartOfAccounts to display
